en.extract:
The pale-throated wren-babbler (Spelaeornis kinneari) is a bird species in the family Timaliidae. It was until recently considered a subspecies of the long-tailed wren-babbler; the IUCN for example started recognizing it as distinct species in 2008.  It is only found in Southwestern China and Vietnam.
Its natural habitat are subtropical or tropical moist montane forests. This is one of the common and widespread taxa in the Long-tailed wren-babbler species complex. However, due to its declining population & reduced habitat, it is currently classified as a Vulnerable species by the IUCN.


Footnotes


References
BirdLife International (BLI) (2008): [2008 IUCN Redlist status changes]. Retrieved 2008-MAY-23.

The '''pale-throated wren-babbler''' ('''''Spelaeornis kinneari''''') is a [[bird]] [[species]] in the [[Family (taxonomy)|family]] [[Timaliidae]]. It was until recently considered a [[subspecies]] of the [[long-tailed wren-babbler]]; the [[IUCN]] for example started recognizing it as distinct species in 2008.<ref name = bli2008>BLI (2008)</ref>  It is only found in Southwestern [[China]] and [[Vietnam]].<ref>{{Cite web |title=Pale-throated Wren-Babbler - eBird |url=https://ebird.org/ebird/species/patwrb1 |access-date=2024-12-25 |website=ebird.org |language=en}}</ref>
<!--
It is found in [[China]], [[India]], [[Myanmar]], and [[Vietnam]].
[check after splits]
-->

Its natural [[habitat]] are subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s. This is one of the common and widespread [[taxa]] in the Long-tailed wren-babbler [[species complex]]. However, due to its declining population & reduced habitat, it is currently classified as a [[Vulnerable species|Vulnerable]] species by the [[IUCN]].<ref name = bli2008 />

zh.extract:
淡喉鹩鹛（学名：Spelaeornis kinneari）也称亮喉鷯鶥，雀形目的一种小型鸟类，隶属于画眉科（林鹛科）鹩鹛属。本种原被视为那伽鹩鹛（Spelaeornis chocolatinus）的一个亚种。


形态特征
淡喉鹩鹛全长9～10.5厘米。头侧灰色；头顶和背羽呈褐色，翅和尾羽纯棕褐色；颏、喉近白色；腹部蓝灰，具白色次端和黑色端斑；胸侧及胁部棕黄褐色。


分布
淡喉鹩鹛主要分布于越南北部和中国云南省东南部，2020年曾在广西北部九万山国家级自然保护区发现。
